case_title: BATELET, NANTIA et al vs. BONTA, LISA INDIVIDUALLY et al

FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OR ORDER TO PUBLISH. HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

HEARING SET FOR JAN-17-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

DECLARATION OF DUE DILLIGENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BATELET, NANTIA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, SUBMISSION OF JUDGMENT STATUS, SETTLEMENT REACHED CONTINUED TO DEC-31-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-18-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-18-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM APR-18-1996 TO MAY-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BONTA, LISA INDIVIDUALLY
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-04-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-20-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), $100.00 SANCTIONS STAYED PENDING PROOF OF SERVICE, ORDER TO PUBLISH, OR DISMISSAL. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 5/20/96. HEARING SET FOR JUN-19-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PHOTOCOPY FOR DEFENDANT BONTA, LISA INDIVIDUALLY
OFF JURY CALENDAR A/C FAILURE TO DEPOSIT JURY FEES WITHIN PRESCRIBED TIME AS SET FORTH IN SEC. 631 CCP RESET FOR COURT TRIAL ON NOV-12-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-19-1997, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED 2/10/97.

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-19-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 4TH ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED: FOR ANSWER OF LISA BONTA AND/OR DISMISSAL OF MUNICIPAL RAILWAYS. HEARING SET FOR SEP-18-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PER COURT ORDER, DEPT. 4: MUNICIPAL RAILWAYS OF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS HEREBY DISMISSED W/OUT PREJUDICE.
